data.body: PASS 1 (T1 prior-art/capability) review note: The plan's central capability question — "does pydantic-ai 1.107.0 anthropic_cache_instructions cache the system_prompt= kwarg?" — appears already RESOLVED and IMPLEMENTED in src/rebar/llm/runner.py. See _anthropic_cache_settings (runner.py:421-435) emitting AnthropicModelSettings(anthropic_cache_instructions=True, anthropic_cache_tool_definitions=True) gated on resolved.startswith("anthropic") (runner.py:428), the inline note at runner.py:213-214 ("anthropic.py:1611-1616, the no-instruction-parts branch caches the system prompt block directly"), usage capture via _extract_usage with cache_read_tokens/cache_write_tokens (runner.py:413-418), and result["_usage"] surfacing (runner.py:303). The plan should reconcile its "SPIKE FIRST" framing against this existing implementation rather than re-deriving it.
